ى„œë¸Œى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ى™€ يک‘ى—… يˆ´ ë¶„ى„‌

ë¶„ى„‌ ىٹ¤ëƒ…ىƒ·: 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/ â€” subagent/collaboration dispatch.

Codexى‌ک ى„œë¸Œى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ëٹ” ىƒ‌ê°پë³´ë‹¤ ى œي’ˆ ê¸°ëٹ¥ى²کëں¼ ë…¸ى¶œëگکى–´ ى‍ˆى§€ë§Œ, ë‚´ë¶€ë¥¼ ë³´ë©´ ى‚¬ى‹¤ىƒپ "يک„ى‍¬ turnى‌„ ê¸°ë°کىœ¼ë،œ ىƒˆ threadë¥¼ spawnي•کëٹ” يک‘ى—… يˆ´ ى„¸يٹ¸"ë‹¤. ى¦‰ ëڈ…ë¦½ëگœ ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ ي”„ë ˆى‍„ى›Œيپ¬ê°€ ë”°ë،œ ى‍ˆëٹ” ê²ƒى‌´ ى•„ë‹ˆë‌¼, ê¸°ى،´ Sessionê³¼ TurnContextë¥¼ ي™•ى‍¥ي•´ى„œ ي•کىœ„ conversationى‌„ ë§Œë“œëٹ” ë°©ى‹‌ى‌´ë‹¤.

ى‌´ ى گى‌´ ى¤‘ىڑ”ي•œ ى‌´ىœ ëٹ” ىڑ°ë¦¬ يڈ¬يپ¬ى—گى„œ subagentë¥¼ ىœ ى§€ي• ى§€ يŒگë‹¨ي•کë ¤ë©´ UIê°€ ى•„ë‹ˆë‌¼ ىƒپى†چ êµ¬ى،°ë¥¼ ë´گى•¼ ي•کê¸° ë•Œë¬¸ى‌´ë‹¤. spawn_agentëٹ” ىƒˆ childë¥¼ ë§Œë“¤ ë•Œ ë¶€ëھ¨ى‌ک effective configë¥¼ ë³µى‚¬ي•کê³ , يک„ى‍¬ model, provider, reasoning effort, approval policy, sandbox, cwd, developer instructionsë¥¼ ë‹¤ى‹œ ëچ®ى–´ى“´ë‹¤. ê·¸ ىœ„ى—گ role configë¥¼ ى¶”ê°€ي•کê³ , SessionSource::SubAgent::ThreadSpawn ë©”يƒ€ëچ°ى‌´ي„°ë،œ ë¶€ëھ¨ى™€ ê¹ٹى‌´ë¥¼ ê¸°ë،‌ي•œë‹¤.

ى¦‰ subagentëٹ” "ë¶€ëھ¨ى™€ ë¹„ىٹ·ي•œ ى„¤ى •ى‌ک ë³„ëڈ„ ëں°يƒ€ى‍„"ى‌´ى§€, ى™„ى „ي‍ˆ ëڈ…ë¦½ëگœ workerê°€ ى•„ë‹ˆë‹¤. ى‌´ ëچ•ë¶„ى—گ ى‌¼ê´€ëگœ ى •ى±… ىƒپى†چى‌€ ى‰½ى§€ë§Œ, ë°کëŒ€ë،œ ى œي’ˆي™”ي•  ë•Œëٹ” ى–´ë–¤ ى„¤ى •ى‌„ ىƒپى†چي•کê³  ى–´ë–¤ ê²ƒى‌€ ëپٹى‌„ى§€ ê²°ى •ي•´ى•¼ ي•œë‹¤. يٹ¹ي‍ˆ developer_instructionsê¹Œى§€ ê·¸ëŒ€ë،œ ë‚´ë ¤ê°„ë‹¤ëٹ” ى گى‌€ ë§¤ىڑ° ى¤‘ىڑ”ي•کë‹¤.

Codexëٹ” ى‌´ يک‘ى—…ë©´ى‌„ toolë،œ ë…¸ى¶œي•œë‹¤. coreى—گëٹ” spawn_agent, send_input, wait_agent, resume_agent, close_agent handlerê°€ ى‍ˆê³ , app-server protocolى‌€ ى‌´ë¥¼ CollabAgentToolCallë،œ ë³„ëڈ„ ê¸°ë،‌ي•œë‹¤. ى¦‰ ى„œë¸Œى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ëٹ” ëھ¨ëچ¸ ë‚´ë¶€ى‌ک ىˆ¨ê²¨ى§„ ê¸°ëٹ¥ى‌´ ى•„ë‹ˆë‌¼, ëھ…ى‹œى پى‌¸ tool surfaceë¥¼ ê°€ى§„ë‹¤.

ëکگي•œ codex_delegate.rsëٹ” ë¶€ëھ¨ى™€ ى‍گى‹‌ ى‚¬ى‌´ى—گى„œ approval, request_user_input, MCP tool ى‌´ë²¤يٹ¸ë¥¼ ى¤‘ê³„ي•œë‹¤. ê·¸ë‍کى„œ childê°€ ى‚¬ىڑ©ى‍گى—گê²Œ ى§پى ‘ ى§ˆë¬¸ي•کى§€ ى•ٹê³ ëڈ„ ë¶€ëھ¨ ى„¸ى…کى‌„ ي†µي•´ ىٹ¹ى‌¸ê³¼ ى‌‘ë‹µى‌„ ë°›ى‌„ ىˆک ى‍ˆë‹¤. ى œي’ˆ ى„¤ê³„ ê´€ى گى—گى„œëٹ” ى‌´ê²ƒى‌´ "subagent orchestration bus" ى—­ي• ى‌„ ي•œë‹¤.

ë§ˆى§€ë§‰ىœ¼ë،œ modeى™€ roleëڈ„ ى¤‘ىڑ”ي•کë‹¤. collaboration mode presetى‌€ plan.md, default.md ê°™ى‌€ ي…œي”Œë¦؟ى—گى„œ developer instructionsë¥¼ ê³µê¸‰ي•کê³ , built-in roleى‌¸ awaiter.toml ê°™ى‌€ يŒŒى‌¼ى‌€ يٹ¹ى • ëھ©ى پى‌ک ي•کىœ„ ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ë¥¼ ë§Œë“œëٹ” ىµœى†Œ ىکˆى‹œê°€ ëگœë‹¤. ى¦‰ Codexëٹ” subagentë¥¼ ë‹¨ىˆœ APIê°€ ى•„ë‹ˆë‌¼ prompt plus config plus state inheritance ë¬¶ى‌Œىœ¼ë،œ ë‹¤ë£¬ë‹¤.

1. AgentControl â€” ى„œë¸Œى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ ى œى–´ يڈ‰ë©´

AgentControlى‌€ ë©€ي‹°ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ ى‹œىٹ¤ي…œى‌ک ي—ˆë¸Œë‹¤. root thread يٹ¸ë¦¬ ي•کë‚کë‹¹ ى‌¸ىٹ¤ي„´ىٹ¤ ي•کë‚کê°€ ë§Œë“¤ى–´ى§€ë©°, ê°™ى‌€ rootى—گى„œ يŒŒىƒ‌ëگœ ëھ¨ë“  ي•کىœ„ ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ê°€ ى‌´ ى‌¸ىٹ¤ي„´ىٹ¤ë¥¼ ê³µىœ ي•œë‹¤. ë‚´ë¶€ى—گëٹ” ThreadManagerStateى—گ ëŒ€ي•œ Weak ى°¸ى،°ى™€ AgentRegistryى‌ک Arcê°€ ى‍ˆë‹¤.

// core/src/agent/control.rs
#[derive(Clone, Default)]
pub(crate) struct AgentControl {
    /// Weak handle back to the global thread registry/state.
    /// This is `Weak` to avoid reference cycles and shadow persistence of the form
    /// `ThreadManagerState -> CodexThread -> Session -> SessionServices -> ThreadManagerState`.
    manager: Weak<ThreadManagerState>,
    state: Arc<AgentRegistry>,
}

ى„¤ê³„ يڈ¬ى‌¸يٹ¸:

  • Weak ى°¸ى،°ë،œ ىˆœي™ک ى°¸ى،°ë¥¼ ë°©ى§€ي•œë‹¤. ThreadManagerState â†’ CodexThread â†’ Session â†’ SessionServices â†’ ThreadManagerState ê²½ë،œê°€ Weakë¥¼ ي†µي•´ ëپٹê¸´ë‹¤.
  • ي•کë‚کى‌ک AgentControlى‌´ root tree ى „ى²´ë¥¼ ى†Œىœ ي•کë¯€ë،œ, ëھ¨ë“  childى‌ک spawn ىٹ¬ë،¯آ·ë‹‰ë„¤ى‍„آ·ê²½ë،œê°€ ي•کë‚کى‌ک AgentRegistryى—گى„œ ê´€ë¦¬ëگœë‹¤.

2. spawn â†’ delegate â†’ wait ى „ى²´ ي‌گë¦„

graph TD
    A["ë¶€ëھ¨ turn: spawn_agent يک¸ى¶œ"] --> B["AgentControl::spawn_agent_internal"]
    B --> C["AgentRegistry::reserve_spawn_slot<br/>(max_threads CAS ى²´يپ¬)"]
    C --> D{"SessionSource ىœ يک•?"}
    D -->|ThreadSpawn| E["prepare_thread_spawn<br/>ë‹‰ë„¤ى‍„آ·ê²½ë،œ ىکˆى•½"]
    D -->|ê¸°يƒ€| F["ê¸°ë³¸ ë©”يƒ€ëچ°ى‌´ي„°"]
    E --> G["shell snapshot ىƒپى†چ<br/>exec policy ىƒپى†چ"]
    F --> G
    G --> H{"fork ىکµى…ک?"}
    H -->|Yes| I["ë¶€ëھ¨ rollout JSONL ىٹ¤ëƒ…ىƒ·<br/>fork_thread_with_source"]
    H -->|No| J["spawn_new_thread_with_source"]
    I --> K["reservation.commit<br/>ë©”يƒ€ëچ°ى‌´ي„° ي™•ى •"]
    J --> K
    K --> L["notify_thread_created<br/>(يپ´ë‌¼ى‌´ى–¸يٹ¸ êµ¬ëڈ… يٹ¸ë¦¬ê±°)"]
    L --> M["send_input: ى´ˆê¸° ي”„ë،¬ي”„يٹ¸ ى „ى†،"]
    M --> N["maybe_start_completion_watcher<br/>(tokio::spawn ë¹„ëڈ™ê¸° ê°گى‹œ)"]

    style C fill:#ffd,stroke:#f90
    style E fill:#dfd,stroke:#090
    style N fill:#ddf,stroke:#009

2.1 spawn ë‹¨ê³„ ىƒپى„¸ ى½”ë“œ

spawnى‌ک ي•µى‹¬ى‌€ spawn_agent_internalى‌´ë‹¤. ى•„ë‍کëٹ” ى£¼ىڑ” ي‌گë¦„ى‌„ ë°œى·Œي•œ ê²ƒى‌´ë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/control.rs â€” spawn_agent_internal (ى¶•ى•½)
async fn spawn_agent_internal(
    &self,
    config: Config,
    items: Vec<UserInput>,
    session_source: Option<SessionSource>,
    options: SpawnAgentOptions,
) -> CodexResult<LiveAgent> {
    let state = self.upgrade()?;                                   // Weak â†’ Arc
    let mut reservation = self.state.reserve_spawn_slot(           // â‘  ىٹ¬ë،¯ ي™•ë³´
        config.agent_max_threads
    )?;
    let inherited_shell_snapshot = self                             // â‘، ë¶€ëھ¨ shell ىƒپى†چ
        .inherited_shell_snapshot_for_source(&state, session_source.as_ref())
        .await;
    let inherited_exec_policy = self                               // â‘¢ ى‹¤ي–‰ ى •ى±… ىƒپى†چ
        .inherited_exec_policy_for_source(&state, session_source.as_ref(), &config)
        .await;

    // â‘£ ThreadSpawnى‌´ë©´ ë‹‰ë„¤ى‍„آ·ê²½ë،œ ىکˆى•½
    let (session_source, mut agent_metadata) = match session_source {
        Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
            parent_thread_id, depth, agent_path, agent_role, ..
        })) => {
            self.prepare_thread_spawn(
                &mut reservation, &config,
                parent_thread_id, depth, agent_path, agent_role,
                None, // preferred_agent_nickname
            )?
        }
        other => (other, AgentMetadata::default()),
    };

    // â‘¤ ى‹¤ى œ thread ىƒ‌ى„± (fork vs ى‌¼ë°ک)
    let new_thread = match session_source {
        Some(session_source) if options.fork_parent_spawn_call_id.is_some() => {
            // ë¶€ëھ¨ rolloutى‌„ JSONL ىٹ¤ëƒ…ىƒ·ىœ¼ë،œ يڈ¬يپ¬
            state.fork_thread_with_source(config, initial_history, self.clone(),
                session_source, false, inherited_shell_snapshot,
                inherited_exec_policy).await?
        }
        Some(session_source) => {
            state.spawn_new_thread_with_source(config, self.clone(),
                session_source, false, None,
                inherited_shell_snapshot, inherited_exec_policy).await?
        }
        None => state.spawn_new_thread(config, self.clone()).await?,
    };

    agent_metadata.agent_id = Some(new_thread.thread_id);
    reservation.commit(agent_metadata.clone());                    // â‘¥ ىکˆى•½ ي™•ى •
    state.notify_thread_created(new_thread.thread_id);             // â‘¦ يپ´ë‌¼ى‌´ى–¸يٹ¸ ى•Œë¦¼
    self.send_input(new_thread.thread_id, items).await?;           // â‘§ ى´ˆê¸° ى‍…ë ¥
    self.maybe_start_completion_watcher(                           // â‘¨ ë¹„ëڈ™ê¸° ى™„ë£Œ ê°گى‹œ
        new_thread.thread_id, notification_source,
        child_reference, agent_metadata.agent_path.clone(),
    );

    Ok(LiveAgent { thread_id: new_thread.thread_id, metadata: agent_metadata,
        status: self.get_status(new_thread.thread_id).await })
}

2.2 send_input â€” ë©”ى‹œى§€ ى „ى†،

// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn send_input(
    &self,
    agent_id: ThreadId,
    items: Vec<UserInput>,
) -> CodexResult<String> {
    let last_task_message = render_input_preview(&items);
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    let result = self.handle_thread_request_result(
        agent_id, &state,
        state.send_op(agent_id, Op::UserInput {
            items,
            final_output_json_schema: None,
        }).await,
    ).await;
    if result.is_ok() {
        self.state.update_last_task_message(agent_id, last_task_message);
    }
    result
}

send_opى‌€ ThreadManagerStateë¥¼ ي†µي•´ ëŒ€ىƒپ threadى—گ Op::UserInputى‌„ ë°œي–‰ي•œë‹¤. ى„±ê³µي•کë©´ registryى‌ک last_task_messageë¥¼ ê°±ى‹ ي•´ list_agents ى،°يڑŒ ى‹œ يک„ى‍¬ ى‍‘ى—… ë‚´ىڑ©ى‌´ ي‘œى‹œëگœë‹¤.

2.3 close_agent â€” ى¢…ë£Œى™€ ي•کىœ„ يٹ¸ë¦¬ ى •ë¦¬

close_agentëٹ” ë‹¨ىˆœي‍ˆ ي•کë‚کى‌ک threadë§Œ ى£½ى‌´ëٹ” ê²Œ ى•„ë‹ˆë‌¼ spawn tree ى „ى²´ë¥¼ ى‍¬ê·€ى پىœ¼ë،œ ىˆœيڑŒي•کë©° ëھ¨ë“  live descendantsë¥¼ ى •ë¦¬ي•œë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn close_agent(&self, agent_id: ThreadId) -> CodexResult<String> {
    // â‘  state_dbى—گ Closed ىƒپيƒœ ê¸°ë،‌ (ى‍¬ى‹œى‍‘ ى‹œ resume ى•ˆ ي•¨)
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    if let Ok(thread) = state.get_thread(agent_id).await
        && let Some(state_db_ctx) = thread.state_db()
    {
        let _ = state_db_ctx.set_thread_spawn_edge_status(
            agent_id, DirectionalThreadSpawnEdgeStatus::Closed
        ).await;
    }
    // â‘، ى‍گى‹  + ëھ¨ë“  ي•کىœ„ ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ shutdown
    self.shutdown_agent_tree(agent_id).await
}

async fn shutdown_agent_tree(&self, agent_id: ThreadId) -> CodexResult<String> {
    let descendant_ids = self.live_thread_spawn_descendants(agent_id).await?;
    let result = self.shutdown_live_agent(agent_id).await;
    for descendant_id in descendant_ids {
        let _ = self.shutdown_live_agent(descendant_id).await;
    }
    result
}

2.4 ى™„ë£Œ ê°گى‹œ â€” completion watcher

ë¶€ëھ¨ê°€ wait_agentë¥¼ ëھ…ى‹œى پىœ¼ë،œ يک¸ى¶œي•کى§€ ى•ٹى•„ëڈ„, ى‍گى‹‌ى‌´ ëپ‌ë‚کë©´ ë¶€ëھ¨ى—گê²Œ ى•Œë¦¼ى‌´ ê°„ë‹¤. ى‌´ë¥¼ maybe_start_completion_watcherê°€ tokio::spawnىœ¼ë،œ ë°±ê·¸ë‌¼ىڑ´ë“œ يƒœىٹ¤يپ¬ë¥¼ ë‌„ى›Œ ى²کë¦¬ي•œë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/control.rs (ى¶•ى•½)
fn maybe_start_completion_watcher(&self, child_thread_id: ThreadId, ...) {
    let Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
        parent_thread_id, ..
    })) = session_source else { return; };

    let control = self.clone();
    tokio::spawn(async move {
        // watch::Receiverë،œ ىƒپيƒœ ë³€ي™”ë¥¼ êµ¬ëڈ…
        let status = match control.subscribe_status(child_thread_id).await {
            Ok(mut status_rx) => {
                let mut status = status_rx.borrow().clone();
                while !is_final(&status) {            // Running/PendingInitى‌´ë©´ ê³„ى†چ ëŒ€ê¸°
                    if status_rx.changed().await.is_err() { break; }
                    status = status_rx.borrow().clone();
                }
                status
            }
            Err(_) => control.get_status(child_thread_id).await,
        };

        if !is_final(&status) { return; }
        // ë¶€ëھ¨ threadى—گ ى™„ë£Œ ë©”ى‹œى§€ ى£¼ى‍…
        let message = format_subagent_notification_message(&child_reference, &status);
        // V2ى—گى„œëٹ” InterAgentCommunication, V1ى—گى„œëٹ” inject_user_message_without_turn
        // ...
    });
}

sequenceDiagram
    participant Parent as ë¶€ëھ¨ thread
    participant Control as AgentControl
    participant Registry as AgentRegistry
    participant Child as child thread
    participant Watcher as completion watcher
    participant Delegate as codex delegate

    Parent->>Control: spawn_agent(config, items)
    Control->>Registry: reserve_spawn_slot(max_threads)
    Registry-->>Control: SpawnReservation
    Control->>Registry: reserve_agent_nickname / reserve_agent_path
    Control->>Child: spawn_new_thread_with_source
    Control->>Registry: reservation.commit(metadata)
    Control->>Child: send_input(ى´ˆê¸° ي”„ë،¬ي”„يٹ¸)
    Control->>Watcher: tokio::spawn(completion_watcher)

    Parent->>Control: send_input(ى¶”ê°€ ى§€ى‹œ)
    Control->>Child: Op::UserInput ى „ë‹¬

    Child->>Delegate: approval ىڑ”ى²­
    Delegate->>Parent: ë¶€ëھ¨ ى •ى±…ىœ¼ë،œ ى¤‘ê³„
    Parent-->>Delegate: ىٹ¹ى‌¸ ى‌‘ë‹µ
    Delegate-->>Child: ى‌‘ë‹µ ى „ë‹¬

    Child-->>Watcher: status â†’ Completed
    Watcher->>Parent: inject notification message

    Parent->>Control: close_agent
    Control->>Child: shutdown_live_agent
    Control->>Registry: release_spawned_thread

3. AgentRegistry â€” ىٹ¬ë،¯آ·ë‹‰ë„¤ى‍„آ·يٹ¸ë¦¬ ê´€ë¦¬

AgentRegistryëٹ” ي•کë‚کى‌ک root session tree ى•ˆى—گى„œ ëھ¨ë“  spawn ى‍گى›گى‌„ ى¤‘ى•™ ê´€ë¦¬ي•œë‹¤.

// core/src/agent/registry.rs
#[derive(Default)]
pub(crate) struct AgentRegistry {
    active_agents: Mutex<ActiveAgents>,
    total_count: AtomicUsize,
}

#[derive(Default)]
struct ActiveAgents {
    agent_tree: HashMap<String, AgentMetadata>,
    used_agent_nicknames: HashSet<String>,
    nickname_reset_count: usize,
}

#[derive(Clone, Debug, Default)]
pub(crate) struct AgentMetadata {
    pub(crate) agent_id: Option<ThreadId>,
    pub(crate) agent_path: Option<AgentPath>,
    pub(crate) agent_nickname: Option<String>,
    pub(crate) agent_role: Option<String>,
    pub(crate) last_task_message: Option<String>,
}

3.1 ىٹ¬ë،¯ ىکˆى•½ â€” CAS ê¸°ë°ک ëڈ™ى‹œى„± ى œى–´

spawn ى‹œ ê°€ى‍¥ ë¨¼ى € يک¸ى¶œëگکëٹ” reserve_spawn_slotى‌€ ى›گى‍گى پ compare-and-swapىœ¼ë،œ ىٹ¤ë ˆë“œ ىˆک ى œي•œى‌„ ë³´ى‍¥ي•œë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/registry.rs
pub(crate) fn reserve_spawn_slot(
    self: &Arc<Self>,
    max_threads: Option<usize>,
) -> Result<SpawnReservation> {
    if let Some(max_threads) = max_threads {
        if !self.try_increment_spawned(max_threads) {
            return Err(CodexErr::AgentLimitReached { max_threads });
        }
    } else {
        self.total_count.fetch_add(1, Ordering::AcqRel);
    }
    Ok(SpawnReservation { state: Arc::clone(self), active: true, .. })
}

fn try_increment_spawned(&self, max_threads: usize) -> bool {
    let mut current = self.total_count.load(Ordering::Acquire);
    loop {
        if current >= max_threads { return false; }
        match self.total_count.compare_exchange_weak(
            current, current + 1, Ordering::AcqRel, Ordering::Acquire,
        ) {
            Ok(_) => return true,
            Err(updated) => current = updated,
        }
    }
}

3.2 SpawnReservation â€” RAII ىکˆى•½/ë،¤ë°±

SpawnReservationى‌€ RAII يŒ¨ي„´ىœ¼ë،œ, spawnى‌´ ى‹¤يŒ¨ي•کë©´ Dropى—گى„œ ى‍گëڈ™ ى •ë¦¬ي•œë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/registry.rs
pub(crate) struct SpawnReservation {
    state: Arc<AgentRegistry>,
    active: bool,
    reserved_agent_nickname: Option<String>,
    reserved_agent_path: Option<AgentPath>,
}

impl SpawnReservation {
    pub(crate) fn commit(mut self, agent_metadata: AgentMetadata) {
        self.reserved_agent_nickname = None;
        self.reserved_agent_path = None;
        self.state.register_spawned_thread(agent_metadata);
        self.active = false;   // Drop ى‹œ ى¹´ىڑ´ي„° ê°گى†Œ ë°©ى§€
    }
}

impl Drop for SpawnReservation {
    fn drop(&mut self) {
        if self.active {       // commit ى•ˆ ëگگىœ¼ë©´ â†’ ىٹ¬ë،¯ ë°کي™ک
            if let Some(agent_path) = self.reserved_agent_path.take() {
                self.state.release_reserved_agent_path(&agent_path);
            }
            self.total_count.fetch_sub(1, Ordering::AcqRel);
        }
    }
}

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Reserved : reserve_spawn_slot
    Reserved --> NicknameReserved : reserve_agent_nickname
    NicknameReserved --> PathReserved : reserve_agent_path
    PathReserved --> Committed : commit(metadata)
    Committed --> [*]

    Reserved --> RolledBack : Drop (spawn ى‹¤يŒ¨)
    NicknameReserved --> RolledBack : Drop
    PathReserved --> RolledBack : Drop
    RolledBack --> [*] : total_count--, path ي•´ى œ

3.3 ë‹‰ë„¤ى‍„ ي’€ê³¼ ë¦¬ى…‹

ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ ë‹‰ë„¤ى‍„ى‌€ agent_names.txtى—گى„œ ë¬´ى‍‘ىœ„ë،œ ë½‘ëٹ”ë‹¤. ي’€ى‌´ ى†Œى§„ëگکë©´ ى¹´ىڑ´ي„°ë¥¼ ىک¬ë ¤ "Atlas the 2nd" ê°™ى‌€ ى„œىˆک ى ‘ë¯¸ى‚¬ë¥¼ ë¶™ى‌¸ë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/registry.rs
fn format_agent_nickname(name: &str, nickname_reset_count: usize) -> String {
    match nickname_reset_count {
        0 => name.to_string(),
        reset_count => {
            let value = reset_count + 1;
            let suffix = match value % 100 {
                11..=13 => "th",
                _ => match value % 10 {
                    1 => "st", 2 => "nd", 3 => "rd", _ => "th",
                },
            };
            format!("{name} the {value}{suffix}")
        }
    }
}

4. agent_resolver â€” ê²½ë،œ ê¸°ë°ک ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ ي•´ى„‌

send_input, wait_agent ë“±ى‌ک ëڈ„êµ¬ëٹ” ëھ¨ëچ¸ى‌´ ë¬¸ى‍گى—´ë،œ ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ë¥¼ ى§€ى •ي•œë‹¤. agent_resolverëٹ” ى‌´ë¥¼ ThreadIdë،œ ë³€ي™کي•œë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/agent_resolver.rs
pub(crate) async fn resolve_agent_target(
    session: &Arc<Session>,
    turn: &Arc<TurnContext>,
    target: &str,
) -> Result<ThreadId, FunctionCallError> {
    register_session_root(session, turn);
    // â‘  ى§پى ‘ ThreadId ë¬¸ى‍گى—´ى‌´ë©´ ى¦‰ى‹œ ë°کي™ک
    if let Ok(thread_id) = ThreadId::from_string(target) {
        return Ok(thread_id);
    }
    // â‘، AgentPath ê¸°ë°ک ي•´ى„‌ (ىکˆ: "workers/auth-fix")
    session.services.agent_control
        .resolve_agent_reference(session.conversation_id, &turn.session_source, target)
        .await
        .map_err(|err| FunctionCallError::RespondToModel(err.to_string()))
}

ë³µىˆک ëŒ€ىƒپëڈ„ ىˆœى°¨ ي•´ى„‌ي•œë‹¤:

pub(crate) async fn resolve_agent_targets(
    session: &Arc<Session>,
    turn: &Arc<TurnContext>,
    targets: Vec<String>,
) -> Result<Vec<ThreadId>, FunctionCallError> {
    if targets.is_empty() {
        return Err(FunctionCallError::RespondToModel(
            "agent targets must be non-empty".to_string(),
        ));
    }
    let mut resolved = Vec::with_capacity(targets.len());
    for target in &targets {
        resolved.push(resolve_agent_target(session, turn, target).await?);
    }
    Ok(resolved)
}

resolve_agent_referenceëٹ” AgentPathى‌ک ىƒپëŒ€ê²½ë،œ ي•´ى„‌ى‌„ ê±°ى³گ agent_treeى—گى„œ ThreadIdë¥¼ ى،°يڑŒي•œë‹¤. root ى‍گى‹ ى‌€ ي•´ى„‌ ëŒ€ىƒپى—گى„œ ى œى™¸ëگœë‹¤.

5. Role ى‹œىٹ¤ي…œ â€” ى—­ي•  ê¸°ë°ک config ë ˆى‌´ى–´

5.1 ë‚´ى‍¥ ى—­ي•  ى •ى‌ک

Codexëٹ” ى„¸ ê°€ى§€ ë‚´ى‍¥ ى—­ي• ى‌„ ى œê³µي•œë‹¤:

ى—­ي•  ى„¤ëھ… config_file يٹ¹ى§•
default ê¸°ë³¸ ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ ى—†ى‌Œ ë¶€ëھ¨ ى„¤ى • ê·¸ëŒ€ë،œ
explorer ى½”ë“œë² ى‌´ىٹ¤ يƒگىƒ‰ ى „ىڑ© explorer.toml ë¹ ë¥´ê³  ê¶Œىœ„ى پ, ë³‘ë ¬ spawn ê¶Œى‍¥
worker ى‹¤ي–‰آ·êµ¬يک„ ى‍‘ى—… ى—†ى‌Œ يŒŒى‌¼ ى†Œىœ ê¶Œ ëھ…ى‹œ, ë‹¤ë¥¸ worker ى‌¸ى‹‌ 
// core/src/agent/role.rs â€” built_in::configs() (ى¶•ى•½)
BTreeMap::from([
    ("default".to_string(), AgentRoleConfig {
        description: Some("Default agent.".to_string()),
        config_file: None,
        nickname_candidates: None,
    }),
    ("explorer".to_string(), AgentRoleConfig {
        description: Some(r#"Use `explorer` for specific codebase questions.
Explorers are fast and authoritative. ..."#.to_string()),
        config_file: Some("explorer.toml".into()),
        nickname_candidates: None,
    }),
    ("worker".to_string(), AgentRoleConfig {
        description: Some(r#"Use for execution and production work. ..."#.to_string()),
        config_file: None,
        nickname_candidates: None,
    }),
])

awaiter ى—­ي• ى‌€ يک„ى‍¬ ى£¼ى„‌ ى²کë¦¬ëگکى–´ ى‍ˆë‹¤ (// Awaiter is temp removed). awaiter.tomlى‌€ ى—¬ى „ي‍ˆ ë‚´ى‍¥ëگکى–´ ى‍ˆىœ¼ë‚ک ى—­ي•  ëھ©ë،‌ى—گى„œ ى œê±°ëگکى—ˆë‹¤.

5.2 explorer.toml ىکˆى‹œ

explorer.toml يŒŒى‌¼ى‌€ ë‚´ى‍¥ يŒŒى‌¼ى‌´ى§€ë§Œ ë°”ى‌´ë„ˆë¦¬ى—گ include_str!ë،œ ى‍„ë² ë”©ëگœë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/role.rs â€” built_in::config_file_contents
pub(super) fn config_file_contents(path: &Path) -> Option<&'static str> {
    const EXPLORER: &str = include_str!("builtins/explorer.toml");
    const AWAITER: &str = include_str!("builtins/awaiter.toml");
    match path.to_str()? {
        "explorer.toml" => Some(EXPLORER),
        "awaiter.toml" => Some(AWAITER),
        _ => None,
    }
}

5.3 awaiter.toml â€” ىµœى†Œ ى—­ي•  config ىکˆى‹œ

# core/src/agent/builtins/awaiter.toml
background_terminal_max_timeout = 3600000
model_reasoning_effort = "low"
developer_instructions="""You are an awaiter.
Your role is to await the completion of a specific command or task
and report its status only when it is finished.
...
"""

ى‌´ يŒŒى‌¼ى‌€ role configى‌ک ىµœى†Œ êµ¬ى،°ë¥¼ ë³´ى—¬ى¤€ë‹¤: ëھ¨ëچ¸ ى„¤ى • + developer instructionsë§Œىœ¼ë،œ ى—­ي• ى‌´ ى •ى‌کëگœë‹¤.

5.4 apply_role_to_config â€” ى—­ي•  ى پىڑ© ë©”ى»¤ë‹ˆى¦ک

ى—­ي•  ى پىڑ©ى‌€ ê¸°ى،´ config layer stackى—گ "session-flag ىڑ°ى„ ىˆœىœ„"ë،œ role TOMLى‌„ ى‚½ى‍…ي•کëٹ” ë°©ى‹‌ى‌´ë‹¤. ى‌´ë•Œ ë¶€ëھ¨ى‌ک profileê³¼ providerëٹ” ëھ…ى‹œى پىœ¼ë،œ ë³´ى،´ëگœë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/role.rs
pub(crate) async fn apply_role_to_config(
    config: &mut Config,
    role_name: Option<&str>,
) -> Result<(), String> {
    let role_name = role_name.unwrap_or(DEFAULT_ROLE_NAME);
    let role = resolve_role_config(config, role_name)
        .cloned()
        .ok_or_else(|| format!("unknown agent_type '{role_name}'"))?;
    apply_role_to_config_inner(config, role_name, &role).await
        .map_err(|err| AGENT_TYPE_UNAVAILABLE_ERROR.to_string())
}

ë³´ى،´ ى •ى±…ى‌ک ي•µى‹¬ ë،œى§پ:

// core/src/agent/role.rs
fn preservation_policy(config: &Config, role_layer_toml: &TomlValue) -> (bool, bool) {
    let role_selects_provider = role_layer_toml.get("model_provider").is_some();
    let role_selects_profile = role_layer_toml.get("profile").is_some();
    // roleى‌´ providerë‚ک profileى‌„ ëھ…ى‹œي•کى§€ ى•ٹىœ¼ë©´ â†’ ë¶€ëھ¨ ê²ƒى‌„ ë³´ى،´
    let preserve_current_profile = !role_selects_provider && !role_selects_profile;
    let preserve_current_provider =
        preserve_current_profile && !role_updates_active_profile_provider;
    (preserve_current_profile, preserve_current_provider)
}

graph LR
    A["ê¸°ى،´ config layer stack"] --> B["role TOML ë،œë“œ<br/>(built-in or يŒŒى‌¼)"]
    B --> C{"roleى‌´ provider/<br/>profile ëھ…ى‹œ?"}
    C -->|No| D["ë¶€ëھ¨ profileآ·provider ë³´ى،´"]
    C -->|Yes| E["roleى‌ک ى„¤ى •ىœ¼ë،œ êµگى²´"]
    D --> F["SessionFlags ىڑ°ى„ ىˆœىœ„ë،œ<br/>layer ى‚½ى‍…"]
    E --> F
    F --> G["Config::load_config_with_layer_stack<br/>ىµœى¢… config ىƒ‌ى„±"]

5.5 spawn tool description ى‍گëڈ™ ىƒ‌ى„±

spawn_agent ëڈ„êµ¬ى‌ک ى„¤ëھ… ي…چىٹ¤يٹ¸ëٹ” ë‚´ى‍¥آ·ى‚¬ىڑ©ى‍گ ى •ى‌ک ى—­ي• ى—گى„œ ى‍گëڈ™ ىƒ‌ى„±ëگœë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/role.rs â€” spawn_tool_spec::build
pub(crate) fn build(user_defined_agent_roles: &BTreeMap<String, AgentRoleConfig>) -> String {
    let built_in_roles = built_in::configs();
    // ى‚¬ىڑ©ى‍گ ى •ى‌ک ى—­ي• ى‌´ ê°™ى‌€ ى‌´ë¦„ى‌ک ë‚´ى‍¥ ى—­ي• ى‌„ ëچ®ى–´ى”€
    let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
    let mut formatted_roles = Vec::new();
    for (name, declaration) in user_defined_roles { /* ... */ }
    for (name, declaration) in built_in_roles { /* ... */ }
    format!("Optional type name...\nAvailable roles:\n{}", formatted_roles.join("\n"))
}

6. depth ى œي•œê³¼ ىƒپيƒœ ë¨¸ى‹ 

6.1 spawn depth ê³„ى‚°

// core/src/agent/registry.rs
fn session_depth(session_source: &SessionSource) -> i32 {
    match session_source {
        SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn { depth, .. }) => *depth,
        _ => 0,
    }
}

pub(crate) fn next_thread_spawn_depth(session_source: &SessionSource) -> i32 {
    session_depth(session_source).saturating_add(1)
}

pub(crate) fn exceeds_thread_spawn_depth_limit(depth: i32, max_depth: i32) -> bool {
    depth > max_depth
}

depth ي•œëڈ„ë¥¼ ى´ˆê³¼ي•کë©´ Feature::SpawnCsvى™€ Feature::Collabى‌´ ë¹„ي™œى„±ي™”ëگکى–´ ي•´ë‹¹ ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ëٹ” ëچ” ى‌´ىƒپ ي•کىœ„ ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ë¥¼ spawnي•  ىˆک ى—†ë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/control.rs â€” resume_single_agent_from_rollout ë‚´ë¶€
if let SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn { depth, .. }) = &session_source
    && *depth >= config.agent_max_depth
{
    let _ = config.features.disable(Feature::SpawnCsv);
    let _ = config.features.disable(Feature::Collab);
}

6.2 AgentStatus ىƒپيƒœ ë¨¸ى‹ 

// core/src/agent/status.rs
pub(crate) fn agent_status_from_event(msg: &EventMsg) -> Option<AgentStatus> {
    match msg {
        EventMsg::TurnStarted(_)  => Some(AgentStatus::Running),
        EventMsg::TurnComplete(ev) => Some(AgentStatus::Completed(ev.last_agent_message.clone())),
        EventMsg::TurnAborted(ev) => match ev.reason {
            TurnAbortReason::Interrupted => Some(AgentStatus::Interrupted),
            _ => Some(AgentStatus::Errored(format!("{:?}", ev.reason))),
        },
        EventMsg::Error(ev) => Some(AgentStatus::Errored(ev.message.clone())),
        EventMsg::ShutdownComplete => Some(AgentStatus::Shutdown),
        _ => None,
    }
}

pub(crate) fn is_final(status: &AgentStatus) -> bool {
    !matches!(status, AgentStatus::PendingInit | AgentStatus::Running | AgentStatus::Interrupted)
}

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> PendingInit : thread ىƒ‌ى„±
    PendingInit --> Running : TurnStarted
    Running --> Completed : TurnComplete
    Running --> Interrupted : TurnAborted(Interrupted)
    Running --> Errored : TurnAborted / Error
    Interrupted --> Running : resume_agent
    Running --> Shutdown : ShutdownComplete

    note right of Completed : is_final = true
    note right of Errored : is_final = true
    note right of Shutdown : is_final = true

7. ىٹ¤ë ˆë“œ ىƒپى†چ ىƒپى„¸

7.1 shell snapshot ىƒپى†چ

ë¶€ëھ¨ى‌ک ى…¸ ي™کê²½(ي™کê²½ ë³€ىˆک, cwd ë“±)ى‌„ ى‍گى‹‌ى‌´ ë¬¼ë ¤ë°›ëٹ”ë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/control.rs
async fn inherited_shell_snapshot_for_source(
    &self, state: &Arc<ThreadManagerState>,
    session_source: Option<&SessionSource>,
) -> Option<Arc<ShellSnapshot>> {
    let Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
        parent_thread_id, ..
    })) = session_source else { return None; };
    let parent_thread = state.get_thread(*parent_thread_id).await.ok()?;
    parent_thread.codex.session.user_shell().shell_snapshot()
}

7.2 exec policy ىƒپى†چ

ى‹¤ي–‰ ى •ى±…ى‌€ ى،°ê±´ë¶€ ىƒپى†چى‌´ë‹¤. ë¶€ëھ¨ى™€ ى‍گى‹‌ى‌ک configê°€ يک¸ي™کëگ  ë•Œë§Œ ë¶€ëھ¨ى‌ک ExecPolicyManagerë¥¼ ê³µىœ ي•œë‹¤:

async fn inherited_exec_policy_for_source(
    &self, state: &Arc<ThreadManagerState>,
    session_source: Option<&SessionSource>,
    child_config: &Config,
) -> Option<Arc<ExecPolicyManager>> {
    // ...
    let parent_config = parent_thread.codex.session.get_config().await;
    if !child_uses_parent_exec_policy(&parent_config, child_config) {
        return None;   // ى •ى±…ى‌´ ë‹¤ë¥´ë©´ ىƒپى†چ ى•ˆ ي•¨
    }
    Some(Arc::clone(&parent_thread.codex.session.services.exec_policy))
}

7.3 resume â€” ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ يٹ¸ë¦¬ ى „ى²´ ë³µى›گ

resume_agent_from_rolloutى‌€ ë‹¨ى‌¼ ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ë§Œى‌´ ى•„ë‹ˆë‌¼ state_dbى—گ ê¸°ë،‌ëگœ child يٹ¸ë¦¬ ى „ى²´ë¥¼ BFSë،œ ىˆœيڑŒي•کë©° ى‍¬ê·€ى پىœ¼ë،œ ë³µى›گي•œë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/control.rs â€” resume_agent_from_rollout (ى¶•ى•½)
pub(crate) async fn resume_agent_from_rollout(&self, config: Config,
    thread_id: ThreadId, session_source: SessionSource,
) -> CodexResult<ThreadId> {
    let resumed_thread_id = self.resume_single_agent_from_rollout(
        config.clone(), thread_id, session_source
    ).await?;

    let mut resume_queue = VecDeque::from([(thread_id, root_depth)]);
    while let Some((parent_thread_id, parent_depth)) = resume_queue.pop_front() {
        let child_ids = state_db_ctx.list_thread_spawn_children_with_status(
            parent_thread_id, DirectionalThreadSpawnEdgeStatus::Open
        ).await?;
        for child_thread_id in child_ids {
            let child_depth = parent_depth + 1;
            // ى‌´ë¯¸ liveى‌´ë©´ ê±´ë„ˆë›°ê³ , ى•„ë‹ˆë©´ rolloutى—گى„œ ë³µى›گ
            if state.get_thread(child_thread_id).await.is_ok() {
                // already live
            } else {
                self.resume_single_agent_from_rollout(
                    config.clone(), child_thread_id, child_session_source
                ).await?;
            }
            resume_queue.push_back((child_thread_id, child_depth));
        }
    }
    Ok(resumed_thread_id)
}

graph TD
    R["resume_agent_from_rollout(root)"] --> A["resume_single(root)"]
    A --> Q["BFS queue: root"]
    Q --> B["state_db: list children of root<br/>(Openë§Œ)"]
    B --> C1["resume_single(child-1)"]
    B --> C2["resume_single(child-2)"]
    C1 --> Q2["queueى—گ child-1 ى¶”ê°€"]
    C2 --> Q3["queueى—گ child-2 ى¶”ê°€"]
    Q2 --> D["child-1ى‌ک children ë³µى›گ..."]
    Q3 --> E["child-2ى‌ک children ë³µى›گ..."]

8. Inter-Agent Communication (V2)

V2ى—گى„œëٹ” ى—گى‌´ى „يٹ¸ ê°„ ى§پى ‘ ë©”ى‹œى§€ êµگي™کى‌´ ê°€ëٹ¥ي•کë‹¤:

// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn send_inter_agent_communication(
    &self, agent_id: ThreadId,
    communication: InterAgentCommunication,
) -> CodexResult<String> {
    let last_task_message = communication.content.clone();
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    let result = self.handle_thread_request_result(
        agent_id, &state,
        state.send_op(agent_id, Op::InterAgentCommunication { communication }).await,
    ).await;
    if result.is_ok() {
        self.state.update_last_task_message(agent_id, last_task_message);
    }
    result
}

completion watcherëڈ„ V2ى—گى„œëٹ” inject_user_message_without_turn ëŒ€ى‹  InterAgentCommunicationى‌„ ى‚¬ىڑ©ي•´ ë¶€ëھ¨ى—گê²Œ ى•Œë¦°ë‹¤:

// completion watcher ë‚´ë¶€ (V2 ê²½ë،œ)
if child_agent_path.is_some() && thread.enabled(Feature::MultiAgentV2) {
    let communication = InterAgentCommunication::new(
        child_agent_path, parent_agent_path,
        Vec::new(), message, /*trigger_turn*/ false,
    );
    let _ = control.send_inter_agent_communication(parent_thread_id, communication).await;
    return;
}
// V1 fallback: ë¶€ëھ¨ threadى—گ user message ى§پى ‘ ى£¼ى‍…
parent_thread.inject_user_message_without_turn(message).await;

ê¸°ىˆ  ى°¸ى،°

يک‘ى—… يˆ´ ي‘œë©´

ëڈ„êµ¬ ى—­ي•  ëŒ€ي‘œ يŒŒى‌¼
spawn_agent child thread ىƒ‌ى„± 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/multi_agents/spawn.rs
send_input childى—گ ى‍…ë ¥ ى „ى†، 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/multi_agents/send_input.rs
wait_agent ي•کë‚ک ى‌´ىƒپ childى‌ک ى¢…ë£Œ ëکگëٹ” ىƒپيƒœë¥¼ ëŒ€ê¸° 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/multi_agents/wait.rs
resume_agent ى¢…ë£Œëگœ child ى‍¬ê°œ (rollout ê¸°ë°ک) 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/multi_agents/resume_agent.rs
close_agent child ى¢…ë£Œ 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/multi_agents/close_agent.rs

spawn_agentê°€ ى‹¤ى œë،œ ىƒپى†چي•کëٹ” ê²ƒ

ي•­ëھ© ىƒپى†چ ى—¬ë¶€ ê·¼ê±°
model ىƒپى†چ build_agent_shared_config()

ي•µى‹¬ êµ¬يک„ى‌€ 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/multi_agents_common.rsى—گ ى‍ˆë‹¤.

subagent ë©”يƒ€ëچ°ى‌´ي„°

ë©”يƒ€ëچ°ى‌´ي„° ى‌کë¯¸

depth يک„ى‍¬ spawn depth
agent_path ى‍‘ى—… ى‌´ë¦„ ê¸°ë°ک ê²½ë،œ (ىکˆ: workers/auth-fix)

app-serverëٹ” ى‌´ ë©”يƒ€ëچ°ى‌´ي„°ë¥¼ thread summaryى™€ history itemى—گëڈ„ ë°کىکپي•œë‹¤. with_thread_spawn_agent_metadata()ëٹ” thread sourceى—گ nicknameê³¼ roleى‌„ ë‹¤ى‹œ ëچ§ى”Œى›Œ UIى™€ ى،°يڑŒ ê²°ê³¼ى—گ ë…¸ى¶œي•œë‹¤.

runtime messaging

ëڈ™ى‍‘ ى‌کë¯¸
send_input ى‌´ë²¤يٹ¸ ë°œي–‰ê³¼ child status ê¸°ë،‌ى‌´ ë¶™ى‌€ interaction tool
wait_agent watch ê¸°ë°ک ىƒپيƒœ ىˆکى§‘ê¸°
close_agent ى¢…ë£Œ ى§پى „ ىƒپيƒœë¥¼ ê°™ى‌´ ê¸°ë،‌, ي•کىœ„ يٹ¸ë¦¬ ى „ى²´ ى •ë¦¬
resume_agent spawn lineageë¥¼ ىœ ى§€ي•œ BFS ë³µى›گ
interrupt_agent Op::Interrupt ë°œي–‰ىœ¼ë،œ ى‹¤ي–‰ ى¤‘ë‹¨

delegate ê³„ى¸µى‌´ ي•کëٹ” ى‌¼

ê¸°ëٹ¥ ى„¤ëھ… يŒŒى‌¼
child spawn ى‹¤ى œ Codex child threadë¥¼ ë‌„ىڑ´ë‹¤ core/src/codex_delegate.rs

request_user_input routing child ى§ˆë¬¸ى‌„ ë¶€ëھ¨ى—گê²Œ ى „ë‹¬ core/src/codex_delegate.rs
MCP tool join approval ى§ˆë¬¸ê³¼ MCP metadataë¥¼ ë‹¤ى‹œ ë¶™ى‍„ core/src/codex_delegate.rs

Axis 06: App surfaces

AXIS

006_app-server-client-surfaces/06_co_surface.md

Overview

Axis 06: App surfaces â€” developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • ë¶„ى„‌ ىٹ¤ëƒ…ىƒ·: 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/ â€” app/server/client surfaces.

  • Codexى‌ک rich client ي‘œë©´ى‌€ CLI ي•کë‚کë،œ ëپ‌ë‚کى§€ ى•ٹëٹ”ë‹¤. ى‹¤ى œ ى¤‘ى‹¬ى‌€ app-server, app-server-protocol, app-server-client ى‚¼ê°پيک•ى‌´ê³ , TypeScript SDKى™€ Python SDKëٹ” ê·¸ ىœ„ë‚ک ë°”ê¹¥ى—گى„œ ê°پê°پ ë‹¤ë¥¸ ى² ي•™ىœ¼ë،œ ë¶™ëٹ”ë‹¤.
  • app-serverëٹ” Codex ى½”ى–´ë¥¼ ى‍¥ê¸° ى‹¤ي–‰ ى„œë²„ë،œ ë…¸ى¶œي•کëٹ” ى‹¤ى œ ëں°يƒ€ى‍„ى‌´ë‹¤. app-server-protocolى‌€ wire schema ى „ىڑ© ê³„ى¸µى‌´ê³ , app-server-clientëٹ” in-processى™€ remoteë¥¼ ê°€ë¦¬ى§€ ى•ٹëٹ” client facadeë‹¤. ى‌´ ى„¸ ى¸µى‌´ rich client ي‘œë©´ى‌ک ي•µى‹¬ى‌´ë‹¤. ë°کë©´ TypeScript SDKëٹ” CLI wrapperى‌´ê³ , Python SDKëٹ” app-serv
  • ى¦‰ ىڑ°ë¦¬ ى œي’ˆى‌´ ë¸Œë‌¼ىڑ°ى €ë‚ک ëچ°ىٹ¤يپ¬ي†± ê°™ى‌€ rich surfaceë¥¼ ë§Œë“¤ ê³„يڑچى‌´ë‌¼ë©´ يڈ¬يپ¬ ê¸°ى¤€ى گى‌€ CLIê°€ ى•„ë‹ˆë‌¼ app-server-protocolë¶€ي„° ى‍،ëٹ” ê²Œ ë§‍ë‹¤. protocol ê²½ê³„ê°€ transportë³´ë‹¤ ëچ” ى¤‘ىڑ”ي•کê¸° ë•Œë¬¸ى‌´ë‹¤.

// Client â†’ Server: initialize ىڑ”ى²­
{
  "id": 1,
  "method": "initialize",
  "params": {
    "clientInfo": {
      "name": "codex_vscode",
      "title": "Codex VS Code Extension",
      "version": "0.1.0"
    },
    "capabilities": {
      "experimentalApi": true,
      "optOutNotificationMethods": ["item/agentMessage/delta"]
    }
  }
}

// Server â†’ Client: initialize ى‌‘ë‹µ
{ "id": 1, "result": { "userAgent": "codex/1.0.0", "serverInfo": { ... } } }

// Client â†’ Server: initialized ى•Œë¦¼ (id ى—†ى‌Œ)
{ "method": "initialized", "params": {} }

README / docs

sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Client
    participant S as App Server
    
    C->>S: thread/start
    S-->>C: thread/started (notification)
    C->>S: turn/start {threadId, input}
    S-->>C: turn/started
    S-->>C: item/started (AgentMessage)
    S-->>C: item/agentMessage/delta (ë°کë³µ)
    S-->>C: item/commandExecution/requestApproval (ServerRequest)
    C->>S: resolve {id, result: {decision: "accept"}}
    S-->>C: item/started (CommandExecution)
    S-->>C: item/commandExecution/outputDelta (ë°کë³µ)
    S-->>C: item/completed (CommandExecution)
    S-->>C: item/completed (AgentMessage)
    S-->>C: turn/completed
    S-->>C: thread/tokenUsage/updated

// app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v2.rs
pub struct Thread {
    pub id: String,
    pub preview: String,         // ë³´ي†µ ى²« ë²ˆى§¸ ى‚¬ىڑ©ى‍گ ë©”ى‹œى§€
    pub ephemeral: bool,         // ë””ىٹ¤يپ¬ى—گ ى €ى‍¥ي•کى§€ ى•ٹëٹ” thread
    pub model_provider: String,  // "openai" ë“±
    pub created_at: i64,         // Unix timestamp
    pub updated_at: i64,
    pub status: ThreadStatus,
    pub cwd: PathBuf,
    pub cli_version: String,
    pub source: SessionSource,   // CLI, VSCode, exec, app-server ë“±
    pub agent_nickname: Option<String>,  // sub-agent ë‹‰ë„¤ى‍„
    pub agent_role: Option<String>,
    pub git_info: Option<GitInfo>,
    pub name: Option<String>,
    pub turns: Vec<Turn>,        // resume/fork/read ë•Œë§Œ ى±„ى›Œى§گ
}

README / docs

pub struct Turn {
    pub id: String,
    pub items: Vec<ThreadItem>,  // resume/fork ى‌‘ë‹µى—گى„œë§Œ ى±„ى›Œى§گ
    pub status: TurnStatus,      // InProgress | Completed | Failed | Interrupted
    pub error: Option<TurnError>,
}

README / docs

pub enum ThreadItem {
    UserMessage { id, content: Vec<UserInput> },
    HookPrompt { id, fragments },
    AgentMessage { id, text, phase, memory_citation },
    Plan { id, text },                    // experimental
    Reasoning { id, summary, content },
    CommandExecution { id, command, cwd, process_id, source,
                       status, command_actions, aggregated_output,
                       exit_code, duration_ms },
    FileChange { id, changes: Vec<FileUpdateChange>, status },
    McpToolCall { id, server, tool, status, arguments,
                  result, error, duration_ms },
    DynamicToolCall { id, tool, arguments, status,
                      content_items, success, duration_ms },
    CollabAgentToolCall { id, tool, status, sender_thread_id,
                          receiver_thread_ids, prompt, model,
                          reasoning_effort, agents_states },
    WebSearch { id, query, action },
    ImageView { id, path },
    ImageGeneration { id, status, revised_prompt, result, saved_path },
    EnteredReviewMode { id, review },
    ExitedReviewMode { id, review },
    ContextCompaction { id },
}

README / docs

pub struct TurnStartParams {
    pub thread_id: String,
    pub input: Vec<UserInput>,
    pub cwd: Option<PathBuf>,                // ى‍‘ى—… ë””ë ‰ي† ë¦¬ ىک¤ë²„ë‌¼ى‌´ë“œ
    pub approval_policy: Option<AskForApproval>,  // ىٹ¹ى‌¸ ى •ى±…
    pub approvals_reviewer: Option<ApprovalsReviewer>,
    pub sandbox_policy: Option<SandboxPolicy>,
    pub model: Option<String>,               // ëھ¨ëچ¸ ىک¤ë²„ë‌¼ى‌´ë“œ
    pub service_tier: Option<Option<ServiceTier>>,
    pub effort: Option<ReasoningEffort>,     // reasoning effort
    pub summary: Option<ReasoningSummary>,
    pub personality: Option<Personality>,
    pub output_schema: Option<JsonValue>,    // structured output
    pub collaboration_mode: Option<CollaborationMode>,  // experimental
}

// app-server/src/transport.rs

    Stdio,
    WebSocket { bind_address: SocketAddr },
}

impl AppServerTransport {
    pub const DEFAULT_LISTEN_URL: &'static str = "stdio://";

    pub fn from_listen_url(listen_url: &str) -> Result<Self, ...> {
        // "stdio://"  â†’ Stdio
        // "ws://IP:PORT" â†’ WebSocket { bind_address }
    }
}

// app-server-client/src/lib.rs

/// ى‌´ë²¤يٹ¸ ىˆکى‹  يƒ€ى‍…
pub enum AppServerEvent {
    Lagged { skipped: usize },      // backpressure ى´ˆê³¼ ى‹œ
    ServerNotification(ServerNotification),
    ServerRequest(ServerRequest),
    Disconnected { message: String },
}

/// ي•µى‹¬ client facade
pub struct InProcessAppServerClient { /* ... */ }

impl InProcessAppServerClient {
    /// ëں°يƒ€ى‍„ ى‹œى‍‘ + initialize/initialized ي•¸ë“œى…°ى‌´يپ¬ ى‍گëڈ™ ىˆکي–‰
    pub async fn start(args: InProcessClientStartArgs) -> IoResult<Self>;

    /// typed JSON-RPC ىڑ”ى²­ â€” ى‌‘ë‹µى‌„ ى œë„¤ë¦­ Të،œ ë””ى½”ë”©
    pub async fn request_typed<T: DeserializeOwned>(
        &self, request: ClientRequest
    ) -> Result<T, TypedRequestError>;

    /// raw JSON-RPC ىڑ”ى²­
    pub async fn request(&self, request: ClientRequest) -> IoResult<RequestResult>;

    /// ى•Œë¦¼ ى „ى†،
    pub async fn notify(&self, notification: ClientNotification) -> IoResult<()>;

    /// ServerRequestى—گ ëŒ€ي•œ ى‌‘ë‹µ (approval ë“±)
    pub async fn resolve_server_request(
        &self, request_id: RequestId, result: JsonRpcResult
    ) -> IoResult<()>;

    /// ServerRequest ê±°ë¶€
    pub async fn reject_server_request(
        &self, request_id: RequestId, error: JSONRPCErrorError
    ) -> IoResult<()>;

    /// ë‹¤ى‌Œ ى‌´ë²¤يٹ¸ ىˆکى‹  (backpressure-aware)
    pub async fn next_event(&mut self) -> Option<InProcessServerEvent>;

    /// graceful shutdown (5ى´ˆ يƒ€ى‍„ى•„ى›ƒ ي›„ abort)
    pub async fn shutdown(self) -> IoResult<()>;
}

README / docs

// app-server-client/src/remote.rs

pub struct RemoteAppServerConnectArgs {
    pub websocket_url: String,
    pub client_name: String,
    pub client_version: String,
    pub experimental_api: bool,
    pub opt_out_notification_methods: Vec<String>,
    pub channel_capacity: usize,
}

pub struct RemoteAppServerClient { /* ... */ }

impl RemoteAppServerClient {
    /// WebSocket ى—°ê²° + initialize ي•¸ë“œى…°ى‌´يپ¬ (10ى´ˆ يƒ€ى‍„ى•„ى›ƒ)
    pub async fn connect(args: RemoteAppServerConnectArgs) -> IoResult<Self>;
    pub async fn request(&self, ...) -> IoResult<RequestResult>;
    pub async fn request_typed<T>(&self, ...) -> Result<T, TypedRequestError>;
    pub async fn notify(&self, ...) -> IoResult<()>;
    pub async fn next_event(&mut self) -> Option<AppServerEvent>;
    pub async fn shutdown(self) -> IoResult<()>;
}

README / docs

/// transport ë¬´ê´€ ي†µي•© surface
pub enum AppServerClient {
    InProcess(InProcessAppServerClient),
    Remote(RemoteAppServerClient),
}

impl AppServerClient {
    pub async fn request(&self, ...) -> IoResult<RequestResult>;
    pub async fn request_typed<T>(&self, ...) -> Result<T, TypedRequestError>;
    pub async fn notify(&self, ...) -> IoResult<()>;
    pub async fn resolve_server_request(&self, ...) -> IoResult<()>;
    pub async fn reject_server_request(&self, ...) -> IoResult<()>;
    pub async fn next_event(&mut self) -> Option<AppServerEvent>;
    pub async fn shutdown(self) -> IoResult<()>;
}

README / docs

classDiagram
    class AppServerClient {
        <<enum>>
        InProcess(InProcessAppServerClient)
        Remote(RemoteAppServerClient)
        +request()
        +request_typed~T~()
        +notify()
        +resolve_server_request()
        +reject_server_request()
        +next_event()
        +shutdown()
    }
    
    class InProcessAppServerClient {
        +start(args) IoResult~Self~
        +request_handle() Handle
    }
    
    class RemoteAppServerClient {
        +connect(args) IoResult~Self~
    }
    
    AppServerClient --> InProcessAppServerClient
    AppServerClient --> RemoteAppServerClient

README / docs

// app-server/src/thread_state.rs
pub struct ThreadState {
    pub pending_interrupts: Vec<...>,
    pub pending_rollbacks: Option<ConnectionRequestId>,
    pub turn_summary: TurnSummary,     // file_change, cmd ى‹¤ي–‰ ىƒپيƒœ ى¶”ى پ
    pub cancel_tx: Option<oneshot::Sender<()>>,
    pub experimental_raw_events: bool,
    pub listener_generation: u64,      // listener êµگى²´ ى‹œ increment
    listener_command_tx: Option<mpsc::UnboundedSender<ThreadListenerCommand>>,
    current_turn_history: ThreadHistoryBuilder,
    listener_thread: Option<Weak<CodexThread>>,
}

README / docs

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Created: thread/start
    Created --> Running: turn/start
    Running --> Running: turn/steer (same-turn steering)
    Running --> Interrupted: turn/interrupt
    Running --> Completed: turn/completed
    Interrupted --> Running: turn/start (new turn)
    Completed --> Running: turn/start (new turn)
    Completed --> Compacting: thread/compact/start
    Compacting --> Completed: compaction done
    Completed --> Archived: thread/archive
    Archived --> Completed: thread/unarchive
    Completed --> Forked: thread/fork
    Completed --> RolledBack: thread/rollback
    RolledBack --> Running: turn/start
    
    Created --> Resumed: thread/resume
    Resumed --> Running: turn/start

README / docs

// app-server-protocol/src/protocol/thread_history.rs
pub struct ThreadHistoryBuilder {
    turns: Vec<Turn>,
    current_turn: Option<PendingTurn>,
    next_item_index: i64,
    current_rollout_index: usize,
    next_rollout_index: usize,
}

impl ThreadHistoryBuilder {
    pub fn new() -> Self;
    pub fn handle_event(&mut self, event: &EventMsg);  // ê³µىœ  reducer
    pub fn handle_rollout_item(&mut self, item: &RolloutItem);
    pub fn finish(self) -> Vec<Turn>;
    pub fn active_turn_snapshot(&self) -> Option<Turn>;
    pub fn has_active_turn(&self) -> bool;
    pub fn reset(&mut self);
}

pub fn build_turns_from_rollout_items(items: &[RolloutItem]) -> Vec<Turn>;

README / docs

// sdk/typescript/src/codex.ts
export class Codex {
  constructor(options: CodexOptions = {});
  startThread(options?: ThreadOptions): Thread;
  resumeThread(id: string, options?: ThreadOptions): Thread;
}

// sdk/typescript/src/thread.ts
export class Thread {
  get id(): string | null;
  async run(input: Input, turnOptions?: TurnOptions): Promise<Turn>;
  async runStreamed(input: Input, turnOptions?: TurnOptions): Promise<StreamedTurn>;
}

// ى‌´ë²¤يٹ¸ يƒ€ى‍… (exec JSONL ê¸°ë°ک)
type ThreadEvent =
  | ThreadStartedEvent    // { type: "thread.started", thread_id }
  | TurnStartedEvent      // { type: "turn.started" }
  | TurnCompletedEvent    // { type: "turn.completed", usage }
  | TurnFailedEvent       // { type: "turn.failed", error }
  | ItemStartedEvent      // { type: "item.started", item }
  | ItemUpdatedEvent      // { type: "item.updated", item }
  | ItemCompletedEvent    // { type: "item.completed", item }
  | ThreadErrorEvent;     // { type: "error", message }

// Item يƒ€ى‍… (7ê°€ى§€ â€” app-serverى‌ک 13ê°€ى§€ë³´ë‹¤ ë‹¨ىˆœي™”)
type ThreadItem =
  | AgentMessageItem | ReasoningItem | CommandExecutionItem
  | FileChangeItem | McpToolCallItem | WebSearchItem
  | TodoListItem | ErrorItem;

README / docs

# sdk/python/src/codex_app_server/client.py
class AppServerClient:
    """Synchronous typed JSON-RPC client for codex app-server over stdio."""

    def __init__(self, config=None, approval_handler=None): ...
    def start(self) -> None: ...
    def close(self) -> None: ...
    def initialize(self) -> InitializeResponse: ...

    # Thread lifecycle
    def thread_start(self, params=None) -> ThreadStartResponse: ...
    def thread_resume(self, thread_id, params=None) -> ThreadResumeResponse: ...
    def thread_list(self, params=None) -> ThreadListResponse: ...
    def thread_read(self, thread_id, include_turns=False) -> ThreadReadResponse: ...
    def thread_fork(self, thread_id, params=None) -> ThreadForkResponse: ...
    def thread_archive(self, thread_id) -> ThreadArchiveResponse: ...
    def thread_unarchive(self, thread_id) -> ThreadUnarchiveResponse: ...
    def thread_set_name(self, thread_id, name) -> ThreadSetNameResponse: ...
    def thread_compact(self, thread_id) -> ThreadCompactStartResponse: ...

    # Turn lifecycle
    def turn_start(self, thread_id, input_items, params=None) -> TurnStartResponse: ...
    def turn_interrupt(self, thread_id, turn_id) -> TurnInterruptResponse: ...
    def turn_steer(self, thread_id, expected_turn_id, input_items) -> TurnSteerResponse: ...

    # Model
    def model_list(self, include_hidden=False) -> ModelListResponse: ...

    # يژ¸ى‌ک ë©”ى„œë“œ
    def wait_for_turn_completed(self, turn_id) -> TurnCompletedNotification: ...
    def stream_until_methods(self, methods) -> list[Notification]: ...
    def stream_text(self, thread_id, text, params=None) -> Iterator[AgentMessageDeltaNotification]: ...

    # ServerRequest ى‍گëڈ™ ى²کë¦¬
    def _handle_server_request(self, msg) -> JsonObject: ...

README / docs

# sdk/python/src/codex_app_server/api.py â€” ê³ ىˆکى¤€ Codex API
class Codex:
    """Minimal typed SDK surface for app-server v2."""
    def __init__(self, config=None): ...
    def thread_start(self, ...) -> ThreadStartResponse: ...
    def run(self, thread_id, input, ...) -> RunResult: ...
    def run_streamed(self, thread_id, input, ...) -> Iterator[Notification]: ...
    def close(self): ...

README / docs

def _default_approval_handler(self, method, params):
    if method == "item/commandExecution/requestApproval":
        return {"decision": "accept"}
    if method == "item/fileChange/requestApproval":
        return {"decision": "accept"}
    return {}

graph LR
    A["leave behind"] --> B["TUI and packaging"]
    A --> C["desktop UX"]
    A --> D["marketplace UI"]

    E --> G["router and registry and handlers"]
